description: CompositionGreen and white checked shirt, made of 100% cotton, that has a full length buttoned placket, long sleeves with a mid-sleeve button, pocket on the left chest, and brand embroidery above the left pocket FittingSlim Wash careonly hand wash in cold water using a mild detergentDo not wring or bleachFlat dry in shadeWarm iron Checks that add immense style to your casual look is what scullers brings into your life. Be the cynosure of all eyes in this stylish shirt, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Pair it with formal pants, denims or corduroys and black footwear for stylish formal and casual looks. Model statisticsThe model wears size M in shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
